languages.text: "Вы меня не знаете, но я знаю вас. Мы заперты во временной петле, и я это докажу".

traits.locale_text: "Вы меня не знаете, но я знаю вас. Мы заперты во временной петле, и я это докажу".

languages.text: "You do not know me, but I know you. We are trapped in a time loop, and I will prove it."
languages.original_text: "Вы меня не знаете, но я знаю вас. Мы заперты во временной петле, и я это докажу".

traits.locale_text: "You do not know me, but I know you. We are trapped in a time loop, and I will prove it."
"You do not know me, but I know you. We are trapped in a time loop, and I will prove it."
"You do not know me, but I know you. We are trapped in a time loop, and I will prove it."

languages.text: “你不认识我，但我认识你。我们被困在时间循环里了，我会证明给你看。”
languages.original_text: "You do not know me, but I know you. We are trapped in a time loop, and I will prove it."

traits.locale_text: “你不认识我，但我认识你。我们被困在时间循环里了，我会证明给你看。”

languages.text: « Vous ne me connaissez pas, mais moi, je vous connais. Nous sommes tous prisonniers d'une boucle temporelle, et je vais vous le prouver. »
languages.original_text: "You do not know me, but I know you. We are trapped in a time loop, and I will prove it."

traits.locale_text: « Vous ne me connaissez pas, mais moi, je vous connais. Nous sommes tous prisonniers d'une boucle temporelle, et je vais vous le prouver. »

languages.text: "Beni tanımıyorsun ama ben seni tanıyorum. Bir zaman döngüsünde sıkışıp kaldık, bunu kanıtlayacağım."
languages.original_text: "You do not know me, but I know you. We are trapped in a time loop, and I will prove it."

traits.locale_text: "Beni tanımıyorsun ama ben seni tanıyorum. Bir zaman döngüsünde sıkışıp kaldık, bunu kanıtlayacağım."

languages.text: «No me conoce, pero yo a usted sí. Estamos atrapados en un bucle temporal y se lo puedo demostrar».
languages.original_text: "You do not know me, but I know you. We are trapped in a time loop, and I will prove it."

traits.locale_text: «No me conoce, pero yo a usted sí. Estamos atrapados en un bucle temporal y se lo puedo demostrar».

languages.text: "Ihr kennt mich nicht, aber ich kenne Euch. Wir sind in einer Zeitschleife gefangen, und ich werde es beweisen."
languages.original_text: "You do not know me, but I know you. We are trapped in a time loop, and I will prove it."

traits.locale_text: "Ihr kennt mich nicht, aber ich kenne Euch. Wir sind in einer Zeitschleife gefangen, und ich werde es beweisen."

languages.text: 「あなたは私を知らないでしょうが、私はあなたを知っています。私たちはタイムループに閉じ込められていて、それを証明します」
languages.original_text: "You do not know me, but I know you. We are trapped in a time loop, and I will prove it."

traits.locale_text: 「あなたは私を知らないでしょうが、私はあなたを知っています。私たちはタイムループに閉じ込められていて、それを証明します」
